How AI Search Changes Product Discovery
AI search changes how users evaluate products by compressing discovery, comparison, and validation into one workflow. The article explains query refinement, source trust, review synthesis, and how product teams should structure content for answer engines. It includes examples from ecommerce, SaaS, and travel.
